---
title: "Nafisa Berlyana Indah Pratiwi"
subtitle: "Lifelong Learner"
image: nafpict.jpeg
about:
  template: jolla
  image-width: 12em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/nafisabip
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/berlyanafisa/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Contact me
      href: mailto:nafisaberlinaindahpratiwi@gmail.com
    - icon: instagram
      text: Instagram
      href: https://www.instagram.com/nafisaberlyana/"
    - icon: journals
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=5iB5_PkAAAAJ&hl=id
---

::: about-paragraph
<p>Hi, call me Naf! With a background in Mathematics and a Master's in Statistics and Data Science, I’m passionate about turning data into insights. I’m skilled in R, just starting out with Python, and love creating visual stories with Looker. I’m also proficient in Microsoft tools and familiar with Visio. My main focus has been on unsupervised learning, and right now, I’m diving deeper into the world of machine learning. Feel free to explore and get to know more about what I do!
I’m open to collaborations, projects, or new opportunities.</p>
:::
